productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Aerostar White Sports Shoes
description: Offering lightweight comfort and packed with features, the adidas Aerostar makes for a fabulous running shoe. For those who love to flaunt a sporty style, this shoe makes for a great casual wear too.UpperHeavily meshed upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfortSynthetic leather overlays with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorptionMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionadiPRENE inserts in the heel for absolute impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durabilityWaffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementImpact guidance system for better shock distribution and energy returnScooped heel for enhanced cushioned comfort to the backfoot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
